race.comment: OUR SASSY LADY (6) was a terrific winner two back when leading pillar-to-post, then went to fast for her own good last time when fading late. Has had a jumpout in between runs and can put that poor showing behind herself here. Expect her to push forward again and take catching. THINK LU BELLA (10) will be hoping OSL overdoes it again in front so she can launch a late assault. Gets in light with the 3kg claim and could prove very tough to stop. PETIT EAGLE (13) is another that will appreciate a solid tempo and has peaks that can take this out. BOLTED IN (2) doesn't win out of turn and while he's been below his best of late he's one to keep in mind. CROWN MINT (5) is ticking along soundly and gets the chance to settle closer this time. Don't dismiss.
